targets.expr: sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", status=~"2.*", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}) / sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"})

sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", status=~"5.*", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}) / sum by(uri) (http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"})

sum by(uri)(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod"}) / sum by(uri)(http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod"})

sum by (status_class) (  label_replace(    rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[5m]),    "status_class", "${1}xx", "status", "(.).."  ))
topk(10, sum by (uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[5m])))

topk(10,   sum by (uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_sum{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[5m]))  /   sum by (uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod", uri!="/actuator/prometheus"}[5m])))
topk(10, sum by(uri, method) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{rrc_site="$site", rrc_component="$type", instance="$pod"}[1m])))
